name: Licorice Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
2 tablespoons of unpopped popcorn will produce 4 cups (or 1 ounce) of popped popcorn.
Place popcorn in a large, buttered baking pan. Put the sugars, water, and corn syrup into a heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium heat and stir. After the mixture has boiled, scrape the sides of the pan. Place a candy thermometer in the pan and cook, without further stirring, to 250°F (as indicated by the thermometer). Remove the pan from heat and stir in butter, baking soda, anise extract, and food coloring. Pour over popcorn, mixing well. Bake, uncovered, for 1 hour, stirring occasionally. When cooled, store in airtight containers.
